docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANSOURI, AMIR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT INSHAKOVA, KATERYNA THE COURT ORDERS NO COSTS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/11/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE: "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED AUG-13-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT INSHAKOVA, KATERYNA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AMIR MANSOURI AND DEFENDANT KATERYNA INSHAKOVA. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY MANSOURI, AMIR AS TO DEFENDANT INSHAKOVA, KATERYNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
